name: Gao Pei
page_title: Gao Pei 高沛 [Liu Zhang] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Assigned to guard Boshui Pass against Zhang Lu as one of Liu Zhang’s noted generals, alongside Yang Hui. When Liu Bei was invited into Shu, Gao Pei wrote several times to Liu Zhang in protest, asking for Liu Bei to be sent back to Jing. When Liu Bei later announced he was returning home, Gao Pei went with Yang Hui to visit Liu Bei but they were executed for lack of courtesy and the pass taken.
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Went to wave Liu Bei off, he had no plan to kill Liu Bei

full_text:
Gao Pei 高沛
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Pei (高沛). Officer of Liu Zhang. Executed after an attempt to assassinate Liu Bei. Gao Pei was affiliated with Liu Zhang. Gao Pei lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Assigned to guard Boshui Pass against Zhang Lu as one of Liu Zhang’s noted generals, alongside Yang Hui. When Liu Bei was invited into Shu, Gao Pei wrote several times to Liu Zhang in protest, asking for Liu Bei to be sent back to Jing. When Liu Bei later announced he was returning home, Gao Pei went with Yang Hui to visit Liu Bei but they were executed for lack of courtesy and the pass taken.
